svg.text: OPL separates framework orchestration from domain truth so expert work can scale without losing quality ownership.

g.text: Stage descriptors · typed queue · attempts · handoff · receipts · human gates · recovery · projection

g.text: The framework owns orchestration metadata; domain agents own professional judgment and deliverables.
